positive: A minimalist, continuous line drawing portrait of a person reading a book, surrounded by floating geometric shapes and delicate abstract elements. The style should evoke Japanese Sumi-e ink wash painting combined with modern Scandinavian design. Black ink on a cream background, single weight line.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, heavy shading, color splash
